description_long: This object appears to be a highly distorted and abstracted representation of an adult pedestrian, with elongated and warped limbs and body parts. The head is somewhat recognizable, featuring human facial features and short hair, but the rest of the body is stretched and twisted into unnatural, ribbon-like forms. The arms and legs are disproportionately long and thin, looping and curving in ways that defy normal human anatomy. The clothing and footwear are difficult to distinguish due to the extreme deformation, but there are hints of shoes and possibly a shirt. The surface is smooth and glossy, with a predominantly dark coloration and some lighter, semi-transparent areas. The overall form is surreal and does not resemble a typical human figure, making it more of an abstract sculpture than a realistic pedestrian.
description: A highly distorted, abstract adult pedestrian figure with elongated, ribbon-like limbs and a recognizable human head, featuring a smooth, glossy surface.
description_view_0: From this angle, the head and upper torso are visible, with the limbs stretched out in sweeping, curved forms.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the extreme distortion of the limbs and the twisted, looping shapes of the body.
description_view_2: The back of the head and the elongated, ribbon-like structure of the body are most prominent here.
description_view_3: The side profile of the head is visible, with the rest of the body appearing as abstract, flowing shapes.
attribute_posture: contorted, abstract pose with limbs extended and twisted
